creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
CATEGORY: x11

This is a update patch for x11/XttXF86srv-*.
(1) (Temporary) ELFization.
    Probrems are not solved. but this ports works fine.
(2) (Temporary) resolve unfetchable distfiles.
    Mastersite for Xtt is under maintenance, So I've put some distfiles to my FTP server.
(3) Update Xtt1.0 -> Xtt1.0pl00
    Now Xtt supports thai and Vetnum fonts.
    fix some bugs (include proportional font probrem).
    supports Japanese font from OS/2 Warp
(4) Other bug fix

Fix: Please apply following patch.
BEGIN>---8<cut here>8---


END>---8<cut here>8-----Nng68uS0k4zSgeKeCoCcRzCdWLoz3YnK805efIrZu5qJgy0D
